claims.comparison_population: chronic HCV (CHC) patients vs healthy controls
claims.supporting_quote: The patients were classified as patients with chronic hepatitis C virus (CHC) (n = 110) or healthy controls (n = 40)... In physically active CHC patients, there was a significant correlation between the expression of miRNAs and increased alanine transaminase (ALT), aspartate transaminase (AST), fibrosis scores, and inflammation activity.
